Hi,
I'm Shivaji Varma.

A Polyglot full stack developer from India.

About.

Currently working as a Staff Software Engineer, having more than years experience in developing internet-based applications. Contributing to architecture, frontend and backend. Skilled in requirement analysis, design, development, coding, integration, and maintenance of web-based applications. Graduated in computer science from GITAM University, Visakhapatnam . In my free time I play CS:GO
Fun fact: You can find my name in the list of jQuery authors . Download Resume Skills. BACKEND END

INTEGRATIONS

     

Experience.
Staff Software Engineer ServiceNow Full-time Hyderabad, India Dec 2017 - Present + yrs
ServiceNow automates enterprise IT operations, creating a single system of record for all IT processes within an organization. Worked on ServiceNow Platform and developed/enhanced products like Major Incident Management, On-Call Management, Task Communication Management, Universal Request, Microsoft Teams integrations etc.
Software Engineer Kagami India Pvt. Ltd. (StartUp) Full-time Hyderabad, India Jul 2016 - Dec 2017 1 yr 6 mos
Kagami, is a next generation ERP solution, which allows Business users to develop ERP modules, package them and deploy to cloud. Developed user interfaces for products from scratch.
Applications Engineer Oracle Full-time Bangalore, India Jul 2015 - Jun 2016 1 yr
Oracle Primavera P6 (Project Management Tool) application. Revamped applet pages with modern UI technologies.
Senior Software Engineer Wipro Full-time Bangalore, India Jun 2012 - Jul 2015 3 yrs 2 mos
Oracle Primavera P6 (Project Management Tool). Revamped applet pages with modern UI technologies.
Honors & awards.
UTG LLama Award Issued by ServiceNow Dec 2021
For helping customer in resolving release critical issue in short time period.
Inspiring Performance Issued by Wipro Technologies Feb 2015
This certificate is awarded for Responsive Micro site implementation and Best Performance in the project.
Best Rookie Issued by Wipro Technologies Aug 2014
This certificate is awarded for Quick learning and Best Performance in the project.
Code Star Issued by Wipro Technologies May 2014
This certificate is awarded for winning in 'CodeStrom' programming contest.
Showcase. List of notable personal projects outside of work.

Goat UI A lightweight web component library, build using stenciljs. So you don't need to include any additional framework dependencies, You can simply import required component js, and right away start using it. Can easily be consumed by any other framework, like Vue, React, Angular, etc. Read More
